scripts.i: npm run install:root && npm run install:client && npm run install:server
scripts.test: cd server && npm test && cd ../client && npm test
scripts.test:create-db: docker compose -f compose.dev.yaml exec -T database psql -U postgres --no-psqlrc -c "DROP DATABASE IF EXISTS db_footsy_test;" && docker compose -f compose.dev.yaml exec -T database psql -U postgres --no-psqlrc -c "CREATE DATABASE db_footsy_test;"
scripts.test:e2e:auth:docker: docker compose -f compose.dev.yaml up -d && npm run test:create-db && npx wait-on tcp:5050 http://localhost:8080 && set "E2E_GRAPHQL_URL=http://localhost:5050" && npx playwright test __tests__/auth.spec.ts --reporter=html && docker compose -f compose.dev.yaml down
scripts.docker:seeder: docker compose -f compose.dev.yaml exec backend npm run seed
